evidence_notes: The frozen brief, fresh isolated lane manifest, honest NotebookLM blocker without browser fallback, independent Codex packet, external skip, atomic buckets, trace-preserving dedupe, gap/delta packet, and Knowledge Wiki Cell handoff are complete.
It explicitly denies execution, agreement-as-truth, registration, source sufficiency, upload, canon, workflow-authoring, and default-route authority.
All lane isolation, blocker/skip, Codex evidence, comparison buckets, trace/delta rule, handoff, and authority boundaries are present.
Its overall blocked label is overly conservative after completing the dry-run comparison/handoff, but does not invalidate the packet.

critical_errors: The comparison labels a common claim even though NotebookLM produced no research packet; both trace items come from the single Codex lane, so cross-lane overlap is fabricated.
missing_required_items: empty common bucket when only one research lane has findings
